creator: wkoszek@freebsd.czest.pl
text:
This looks like a technical problem. pkgng should have the mechanism to ask whether the user agrees with the license at the time of the package installation.

audio/lame is one of the most useful codecs out there and 70% of webpages about audio stuff in *nix systems show examples about how to do stuff with it.

Users don't really care about licenses that much. They just want to get their tools in zero time.
